tooluniverse_health.error:
tokenizers>=0.19,<0.20 is required for a normal functioning of this module, but found tokenizers==0.22.2.
Try: `pip install transformers -U` or `pip install -e '.[dev]'` if you're working with git main

tools.name: acvr1_target_profile_tool
tools.description: Returns a curated mock ACVR1 target profile with disease links and pathway notes.

tools.name: fop_disease_profile_tool
tools.description: Returns a curated mock Fibrodysplasia Ossificans Progressiva disease profile.

tools.name: rdkit_descriptor_tool
tools.description: Mock RDKit-compatible descriptor tool. Replace with RDKit implementation when dependency is available.

tools.name: evidence_quality_scorer_tool
tools.description: Scores whether evidence supports, contradicts, or is irrelevant to a therapeutic hypothesis.

example_input.hypothesis: Inhibiting ACVR1 may reduce aberrant osteogenic signaling in FOP.
example_input.evidence_text: ACVR1 variants activate BMP signaling in FOP models.

tools.name: hypothesis_card_generator_tool
tools.description: Creates a structured candidate hypothesis card from disease, target, molecule, and evidence records.

tools.name: experiment_recommendation_tool
tools.description: Ranks computational and wet-lab validation steps for a hypothesis card.

tools.name: tooluniverse_unavailable
tools.description: ToolUniverse package could not be imported in the current environment.
tools.notes:
tokenizers>=0.19,<0.20 is required for a normal functioning of this module, but found tokenizers==0.22.2.
Try: `pip install transformers -U` or `pip install -e '.[dev]'` if you're working with git main
